tagline: Discover, save, and share exceptional cocktails.
tone: sophisticated but approachable, knowledgeable without being pretentious, aspirational
target_audience: cocktail enthusiasts aged 25-45, home bartenders, people who enjoy craft drinks and entertaining
content_pillars: technique explorer — bartending methods and skills
trending ingredients spotlight — what's hot in cocktail culture
spirit provenance and terroir — origin stories and regional traditions
bartender spotlight — expert tips and industry commentary
seasonal and limited release alerts — timely ingredient features
what can I make challenges — ingredient-based engagement
cocktail history deep dives — stories behind classics
